parameters.label: Project Name
parameters.description: The name of the resulting project.

parameters.label: Organization
parameters.description: The organization responsible for your new Flutter project, in reverse domain name notation.

parameters.label: Description
parameters.description: The description to use for your new Flutter project.

parameters.label: Empty Project
parameters.description: Specifies creating an empty project with less example code.

parameters.label: Supported Platforms
parameters.description: The platforms supported by this project.

parameters.label: Output Directory
parameters.description: The path where the project will be created.
